title: Individual Development Account (IDA)
html:
Stub. Individual Development Account — a community-asset-building program where a participant's savings are matched (typically 1:1 to 4:1) by program funds for use toward a "qualified asset" (education, home, business). Yahir is enrolled in one with a 3:1 match at the $3,000 threshold, targeting $9K of matched funds → $12K total.

First mentioned in 2026 01 09 ida account meta.

Connections

  • matched savings — parent concept
  • 529 college savings plan — Yahir's queued next-vehicle after IDA hits the match
  • bridge income strategies — fits the slow-money rails Yahir builds beneath rankett
